intent: Validate Phase 1 (VoxelEntities) replaces actor billboards with voxel meshes.
Validate Phase 2 (ProceduralBuildings) renders buildings as procedural meshes.
Validate Phase 3 (CrossedQuadFoliage) renders trees and bushes with crossed quads and wind animation.
Validate Phase 4 (MeshWater) renders water with Gerstner waves and shoreline foam.
Validate Phase 5 (HighShadows) renders directional sun shadows with cascaded shadow maps.
Validate Phase 6 (SkeletalAnimation) animates voxel actors via skeleton rig.
Validate Phase 7 (WorldspaceUI) renders nameplates, HP bars, and selection rings in 3D space.
Validate Phase 8 (DayNightCycle) cycles sky color from dawn to noon to dusk.
Validate Phase 9 (PostFX) applies bloom and color grading post-processing effects.
Validate Phase 10 (LOD Impostor) gates distant entities to impostor billboards for performance.
Human in-game smoke gate for Phase 1 (VoxelEntities). Checklist: docs/smoke-test-phase1.md
Human in-game smoke gate for Phase 2 (ProceduralBuildings). Checklist: docs/smoke-test-phase2.md
Human in-game smoke gate for Phase 3 (CrossedQuadFoliage). Checklist: docs/smoke-test-phase3.md
Human in-game smoke gate for Phase 4 (MeshWater). Checklist: docs/smoke-test-phase4.md
Human in-game smoke gate for Phase 5 (HighShadows + HdrSkybox). Checklist: docs/smoke-test-phase5.md
Human in-game smoke gate for Phase 6 (SkeletalAnimation). Checklist: docs/smoke-test-phase6.md
Human in-game smoke gate for Phase 7 (WorldspaceUI). Checklist: docs/smoke-test-phase7.md
Human in-game smoke gate for Phase 8 (DayNightCycle). Checklist: docs/smoke-test-phase8.md
Human in-game smoke gate for Phase 9 (PostFX). Checklist: docs/smoke-test-phase9.md
Human in-game smoke gate for Phase 10 (LOD impostor). Checklist: docs/smoke-test-phase10.md
